text: It's called brand identity and marketing. All successful companies have that.
Trueeee 😌being telling this to my clients and been watching them come back in 4 months or so :)
Yeah , this specific thing even we say to our clients. Go try Lenskart explore , eventually you will come back to us for a greater quality 🤞✨

To everyone saying “agar client wapas nahi aaya to? it’s deeper than that.

If a client isn’t coming back, it doesn’t always mean you’re not good enough. Sometimes it’s because someone else is offering the same — and “same” doesn’t stand out.

To build a name, you can’t just be good. You have to be remembered.

Work on your craft, but also your experience, your energy, your signature.

Compete with yourself — that’s how you truly stand out. 🤍

errorDescription: Empty or private data for provided input

text:
The brand name Gully Lab feels a bit underwhelming and doesn’t create a strong identity. The use of “Gully” written in Hindi on the shoe is also limiting—it may not connect with a wider audience, especially people who don’t understand Hindi.
The design choices could be improved. Writing “Lab” in large text on the back of the shoe doesn’t look very appealing. A minimal logo would work much better and give the product a cleaner, more premium feel.
Overall, the concept has potential, but the branding and design need refinement to appeal to a broader market.

@gullylabs PLEASE MAKE WIDE TOE BOX SHOES - give space for toes to spread out so we don't end up with feet de formation like all the shoes in the world- we need anatomical shoes in this planet. Wide toe box is healthy. I don't use regular shoes anymore
